referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Split hero with left editorial copy and right organic/blob-masked portrait image on a mostly white surface.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Large serif headline with generous line-height and substantial white space around the hero copy.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: No heavy stats strip; trust is communicated through lightweight chips near the hero CTA.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Centered, airy 2x2 service grid with icon + short label/description and minimal card treatment.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Doctor profile in a two-column composition: text block and circular portrait image with subtle navigation affordance styling.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Minimal quote cards with soft borders and lots of breathing room rather than dense card stacks.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Off-white hero -> white services -> pale-mint doctor band -> warm CTA panel -> white contact/footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Very airy spacing with broad margins and low visual noise.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Soft rectangular buttons with subtle rounded corners, low-contrast ghost variant, and restrained shadows.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Mostly neutral cream/white background with selective mint accent in shapes, chips, and icons.
